title: 1 step DFU - User can trigger firmware update for just Charge Case
scenario: Firmware update can be triggered for Voyager Free 60+ Charge Case only without updating Earbuds
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the Voyager Free 60 Earbuds and Charger Case are connected and both are on firmware version 5039 or higher.
3. Verify that a firmware update is available for both the Earbuds and the Charger Case.
4. Navigate to the Home screen, then tap on the connected device name (Voyager Free 60).
6. Tap the Update button for the Charge Case only (do not select the Earbuds update).
7. Wait for the Charge Case firmware update to complete.
expected: Only the Charge Case (Voyager Free 60 Charger Case) firmware update completes successfully. The Earbuds remain on the lower firmware version (5039 or higher, unchanged).
